english: What is the recommended depth for storing water in a rural household well in India to prevent contamination?
hindi: भारत में एक ग्रामीण घरेलू कुंड में पानी को दूषित होने से रोकने के लिए स्टोर करने के लिए सिफारिश की गई गहराई क्या है?
tamil: இந்தியாவில் ஒரு கிராமப்புற வீட்டில் உள்ள குளத்தில் தூய்மையைக் காக்க வைக்கும் நீரைச் சேமிக்க ஏற்படும் முறையான ஆழம் என்ன?
vietnamese: Độ sâu được khuyến nghị để lưu trữ nước trong một giếng gia đình nông thôn ở Ấn Độ để ngăn chặn ô nhiễm là gì?
correct_answer: The recommended depth for storing water in a rural household well in India is at least 10 meters below the ground surface to prevent contamination from surface water and other external sources.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating a different depth or refusing to answer due to lack of specific information about rural water storage best practices in India.
